Class CurseManager

java.lang.Object
xyz.yaszu.freedom.Subsystems.CurseManager
All Implemented Interfaces:
org.bukkit.event.Listener
public class CurseManager extends Object implements org.bukkit.event.Listener
a system allowing players to apply curses to others. curses last for 3 minutes or until uncursed. curse makes players turn into an animal of choice restricting their chat messages. the messages will also play sounds when attempting to speak in chat.

    • curse

      public static void curse(org.bukkit.entity.Player victim, org.bukkit.entity.Player curser)

      Parameters:
      victim - player cursed
      curser - player aplieing curse

    • uncurse

      public static void uncurse(org.bukkit.entity.Player victim)
      removes curse from player
      Parameters:
      victim - player uncursed

    • isCursed

      public static boolean isCursed(org.bukkit.entity.Player player)
      boolean for if player is cursed
      Parameters:
      player - player checked
      Returns:
      if or if not cursed

    • handleChat

      public static String handleChat(org.bukkit.entity.Player player, String message)
      changes what player says acording to curse type
      Parameters:
      player - player sending message
      message - message attempted to be sent
      Returns:
      message sent
